ai_operational_proposals_status_only_rev.name: ai_operational_proposals_status_only_review
ai_operational_proposals_status_only_rev.value:
(
        "ai_operational_proposals"."status" = 'proposed'
        and "ai_operational_proposals"."review_decision" is null
        and "ai_operational_proposals"."reviewed_by_user_id" is null
        and "ai_operational_proposals"."reviewed_at" is null
      ) or (
        "ai_operational_proposals"."status" in ('approved', 'rejected')
        and "ai_operational_proposals"."review_decision" = "ai_operational_proposals"."status"
        and "ai_operational_proposals"."reviewed_by_user_id" is not null
        and "ai_operational_proposals"."reviewed_at" is not null
      )

legal_research_artifacts_status_only_rev.name: legal_research_artifacts_status_only_review
legal_research_artifacts_status_only_rev.value:
(
        "legal_research_artifacts"."status" in ('draft', 'ready_for_review')
        and "legal_research_artifacts"."review_decision" is null
        and "legal_research_artifacts"."reviewed_by_user_id" is null
        and "legal_research_artifacts"."reviewed_at" is null
      ) or (
        "legal_research_artifacts"."status" in ('reviewed', 'rejected')
        and "legal_research_artifacts"."review_decision" = "legal_research_artifacts"."status"
        and "legal_research_artifacts"."reviewed_by_user_id" is not null
        and "legal_research_artifacts"."reviewed_at" is not null
      )

appointment_booking_requests_review_agin.name: appointment_booking_requests_review_aging_decision_complete
appointment_booking_requests_review_agin.value: ("appointment_booking_requests"."review_aging_decision" is null and "appointment_booking_requests"."review_aging_decided_at" is null and "appointment_booking_requests"."review_aging_decided_by_user_id" is null and "appointment_booking_requests"."review_aging_cue_status" is null and "appointment_booking_requests"."review_aging_age_hours" is null) or ("appointment_booking_requests"."review_aging_decision" is not null and "appointment_booking_requests"."review_aging_decided_at" is not null and "appointment_booking_requests"."review_aging_decided_by_user_id" is not null and "appointment_booking_requests"."review_aging_cue_status" is not null and "appointment_booking_requests"."review_aging_age_hours" is not null)

calendar_event_reminders_scope_target.name: calendar_event_reminders_scope_target
calendar_event_reminders_scope_target.value: ("calendar_event_reminders"."scope" = 'matter' and "calendar_event_reminders"."matter_id" is not null and "calendar_event_reminders"."client_contact_id" is null) or ("calendar_event_reminders"."scope" = 'firm' and "calendar_event_reminders"."matter_id" is null and "calendar_event_reminders"."client_contact_id" is null) or ("calendar_event_reminders"."scope" = 'client' and "calendar_event_reminders"."matter_id" is null and "calendar_event_reminders"."client_contact_id" is not null)

calendar_events_firm_matter_uid_idx.name: calendar_events_firm_matter_uid_idx
calendar_events_firm_matter_uid_idx.where: "calendar_events"."deleted_at" is null and "calendar_events"."matter_id" is not null

calendar_events_firm_scope_uid_idx.name: calendar_events_firm_scope_uid_idx
calendar_events_firm_scope_uid_idx.where: "calendar_events"."deleted_at" is null and "calendar_events"."matter_id" is null and "calendar_events"."client_contact_id" is null

calendar_events_firm_client_uid_idx.name: calendar_events_firm_client_uid_idx
calendar_events_firm_client_uid_idx.where: "calendar_events"."deleted_at" is null and "calendar_events"."client_contact_id" is not null

calendar_events_scope_target.name: calendar_events_scope_target
calendar_events_scope_target.value: ("calendar_events"."scope" = 'matter' and "calendar_events"."matter_id" is not null and "calendar_events"."client_contact_id" is null) or ("calendar_events"."scope" = 'firm' and "calendar_events"."matter_id" is null and "calendar_events"."client_contact_id" is null) or ("calendar_events"."scope" = 'client' and "calendar_events"."matter_id" is null and "calendar_events"."client_contact_id" is not null)

calendar_scheduling_requests_review_agin.name: calendar_scheduling_requests_review_aging_decision_complete
calendar_scheduling_requests_review_agin.value: ("calendar_scheduling_requests"."review_aging_decision" is null and "calendar_scheduling_requests"."review_aging_decided_at" is null and "calendar_scheduling_requests"."review_aging_decided_by_user_id" is null and "calendar_scheduling_requests"."review_aging_cue_status" is null and "calendar_scheduling_requests"."review_aging_age_hours" is null) or ("calendar_scheduling_requests"."review_aging_decision" is not null and "calendar_scheduling_requests"."review_aging_decided_at" is not null and "calendar_scheduling_requests"."review_aging_decided_by_user_id" is not null and "calendar_scheduling_requests"."review_aging_cue_status" is not null and "calendar_scheduling_requests"."review_aging_age_hours" is not null)

contact_relationships_date_order.name: contact_relationships_date_order
contact_relationships_date_order.value: "contact_relationships"."ended_on" is null or "contact_relationships"."effective_on" is null or "contact_relationships"."ended_on" >= "contact_relationships"."effective_on"

matter_parties_date_order.name: matter_parties_date_order
matter_parties_date_order.value: "matter_parties"."ended_on" is null or "matter_parties"."started_on" is null or "matter_parties"."ended_on" >= "matter_parties"."started_on"

trust_posting_requests_posted_fields.name: trust_posting_requests_posted_fields
trust_posting_requests_posted_fields.value: "trust_posting_requests"."status" <> 'posted' or ("trust_posting_requests"."reviewed_by_user_id" is not null and "trust_posting_requests"."reviewed_at" is not null and "trust_posting_requests"."ledger_transaction_id" is not null)

trust_posting_requests_rejected_fields.name: trust_posting_requests_rejected_fields
trust_posting_requests_rejected_fields.value: "trust_posting_requests"."status" <> 'rejected' or ("trust_posting_requests"."reviewed_by_user_id" is not null and "trust_posting_requests"."reviewed_at" is not null and "trust_posting_requests"."rejection_reason" is not null and length(trim("trust_posting_requests"."rejection_reason")) > 0 and "trust_posting_requests"."ledger_transaction_id" is null)

tasks_source_pair.name: tasks_source_pair
tasks_source_pair.value: ("tasks"."source_type" is null and "tasks"."source_id" is null) or ("tasks"."source_type" is not null and length(trim(coalesce("tasks"."source_id", ''))) > 0)
